items.name: color-picker-theme
items.title: Vuelor Theme
items.description: Tailwind v4 design tokens (colors + shadows) required by @vuelor/picker in its default tailwindcss styling mode.

items.name: color-picker-mini
items.title: Color Picker (Mini)
items.description: Minimal color picker — a saturation/brightness canvas with a hue slider.
items.author: Vuelor <https://vuelor.dev>
items.docs: Tailwind v4 (shadcn-vue default): the required vuelor-* tokens are installed automatically via the color-picker-theme registry dependency. Tailwind v3 only: add './node_modules/@vuelor/picker/dist/index.js' to your tailwind.config content array so the vuelor-* utility classes are not purged. Non-Tailwind projects: set styling="vanillacss" on ColorPickerRoot and import '@vuelor/picker/style.css'.

items.name: color-picker-mini-styled
items.title: Color Picker (Mini, Styled)
items.description: Mini color picker with a rounded canvas and custom slider thumb styling applied through the ui prop.

items.docs: Tailwind v4 (shadcn-vue default): the required vuelor-* tokens are installed automatically via the color-picker-theme registry dependency. Tailwind v3 only: add './node_modules/@vuelor/picker/dist/index.js' to your tailwind.config content array so the vuelor-* utility classes are not purged. Non-Tailwind projects: set styling="vanillacss" on ColorPickerRoot and import '@vuelor/picker/style.css'.

items.name: color-picker
